detection_method: spacy.matcher.Matcher on verb TAG sequences (VBD, VBN, VBZ, MD+VB, etc.) + Regex for auxiliaries
description: Rules covering the English tense and aspect system: past/present/future forms, passive voice, and verb constructions. Unified detection via verb POS tag sequences and auxiliary patterns.
